LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CATHRYN BLUM, DANIEL CHIANG'S MOTION FOR ISSUANCE OF PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. AFTER A BRIEF IN-CAMERA SESSION IN THE JUDGE'S CHAMBER, THE COURT HEARD THE ARGUMENTS OF BOTH PARTIES IN OPEN COURT. THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. DEFENDANTS WERE ORDERD TO TAKE IMMDEDIATE STEPS TO MAKE THE PREMISES TO A HABITABLE CONDITION. ALSO, THE COURT WANT TO SEE A REPORT REGARDING THE STATUS OF THE MOLD CONDITION OF THE PREMISES. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. THE PARTIES WERE ORDERED TO BE BACK IN COURT DURING EX-PARTE TIME ON JULY 31, 2006 RE STATUS REPORT AND, ALSO ON AUGUST 14, 2006 AT 2:00 PM. TO FURTHER HEAR RE STATUS REPORT.=(302/REQ/JT)BELDON YEE # 2647

TIMOTHY C. CONNOR,ESQ. 650/ 365- 7700-OP

RULING; AFTER A BRIEF IN-CAMERA SESSION AT THE JUDGE'S CHAMBER, THE COURT HEARD THE ARGUMENTS OF BOTH PARTIES IN OPEN COURT. THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. DEFENDANTS WERE ORDERD TO TAKE IMMDEDIATE STEPS TO MAKE THE PREMISES TO A HABITABLE CONDITION. ALSO, THE COURT WANT TO SEE A REPORT REGARDING THE STATUS OF THE MOLD CONDITION OF THE PREMISES. Prevailing party to prepare order. THE PARTIES WERE ORDERED TO BE BACK IN COURT DURING EX-PARTE TIME ON JULY 31, 2006 RE STATUS REPORT AND, ALSO ON AUGUST 14, 2006 AT 2:00 PM. TO FURTHER HEAR RE STATUS REPORT.=(302/REQ/JT)BELDON YEE # 2647
